channel.title: Hmm on Jordanne Chan
channel.description: Recent content in Hmm on Jordanne Chan

item.title: Screaming Internally
item.description:
Hello, I’m Jordanne. I do a lot of internal screaming, so this is intended to be an outlet for that. The intended audience: no one in particular. Just Jordanne screaming into the void.

Possibly screaming about: injustice, petty minutiae, how wonderful my cats are, pedagogical methodologies, social interaction, hamsters, existential despair, beautiful chairs…
